product_basic_kyc.product_name: Tatsya Premium Marble Cake Stand with Gold Metal Base - Elegant Dessert Display Pedestal
product_basic_kyc.product_category: Home & Kitchen > Kitchen & Dining > Serveware > Cake Stands & Dessert Displays
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Urban Indian families and individuals aged 25-45 who enjoy hosting events, celebrations, and stylish home decor
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Displaying cakes, desserts, and pastries during festive occasions and family celebrations
secondary_use_cases: Serving appetizers and finger foods at parties
Decorative centerpiece for dining or coffee tables
Use in cafes and boutique bakeries for elegant presentation
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for Indian festivals like Diwali, weddings, birthdays, and other celebratory gatherings at home

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Marble is widely appreciated in Indian homes for its durability and classic elegance, making this cake stand well-suited for traditional celebrations and modern festive decor
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Used primarily at home during special occasions, religious festivals, or family get-togethers to elegantly showcase sweets and desserts
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Blends modern minimalist design with traditional quality aesthetics enhancing celebratory moments and gifting culture in India
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Offers pride and joy to host appealing, Instagram-worthy dessert presentations while ensuring sturdiness and easy maintenance for busy Indian households

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Marble Cake Stand with Gold Metal Base – Elegant Round Dessert Display Pedestal for Indian Festivals & Events
bullet_points: Premium Quality Marble Top – Smooth and Durable Surface Perfect for Cakes & Desserts
Elegant Gold Metal Base – Sturdy and Stylish Complement to Any Indian Festive Setup
Multi-Use Serveware – Ideal for Weddings, Birthdays, Diwali, and Home Celebrations
Compact & Lightweight Design – Easy to Handle and Clean, Fits Any Dining Table
Perfect Gift Idea – Thoughtful Present for Couples and Hosting Enthusiasts
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Elevate your celebrations with the Tatsya Marble Cake Stand featuring a smooth marble top and a chic gold metal base. Perfect for festive occasions and family events, this cake stand combines elegance with practicality, offering a premium platform to showcase your desserts and sweets.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Detailed close-up shots showcasing marble texture and gold base finish
Lifestyle images of Indian festivals and family gatherings featuring the cake stand
Usage scenarios including cakes, sweets, and appetizers on the stand
Material quality & craftsmanship story focused on marble and metal combination

long_tail_keywords: elegant marble and metal cake stand for Diwali
stylish dessert serving pedestal for Indian weddings
lightweight cake stand for home parties and events
premium gift for cake lovers in India
easy to clean marble cake stand with gold base

competitor_analysis.competitor_approaches: Competitors focus on highlighting material quality and occasion suitability, with heavy emphasis on festive decorations and lifestyle images showing cakes and sweets on stands.
common_themes: Emphasis on marble or stone material durability
Use of gold or metallic accents for luxury appeal
Lifestyle images during Indian festivals and weddings
gaps_weaknesses: Lack of focus on easy cleaning and maintenance
Limited image variety showing everyday non-festive use
Underrepresented lifestyle themes focused on gifting
Many listings use generic backgrounds lacking Indian cultural setting
overused_approaches: Generic cake photos without clear product focus
Generic South Asian festival representations without product context

visual_improvements: Use clean, minimalist backgrounds with subtle Indian festive elements
Showcase product in real-life Indian home settings without clutter
Highlight marble texture details alongside reflective gold base
messaging_improvements: Stress practicality like ease of cleaning and durability
Include gifting and multipurpose utility messaging
Connect emotionally with Indian celebration values
lifestyle_positioning: Present as indispensable for both everyday serving and special occasions
Incorporate Indian festival décor themes softly in images
trust_premium_perception: Focus on brand credibility with premium materials
Consistent elegant brand color tone and font styling

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Maintain exact round white marble top with natural veining, gold tapered circular metal base with polished finish and visible Tatsya branding if any.
recommended_image_angles: Full product centered on white background
recommended_real_life_environments: Festively decorated living room during Diwali
Birthday party setup with vibrant decorations
indian_lifestyle_settings: Wedding mehendi or reception dessert display
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Use soft natural and studio lighting emphasizing marble texture and metal shine with reflections to highlight premium finish, balanced shadows for depth and realism.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean white backgrounds with selective warm tones, minimal props, easy readability, and elegant font overlays consistent with Tatsya brand palette.

suitable_backgrounds: Subtle traditional Indian fabrics as blurred background
Festive setting with minimal diya lamps and marigold garlands
lifestyle_scenarios: Celebrating Diwali with sweets on cake stand
Casual family gathering with cake ready for cutting
Home office desk serving snacks during breaks
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Top or bottom area in images with clean space for bullet point highlights or product benefits; avoid overlapping the product.
what_must_be_avoided: Non-Indian cultural props conflicting with theme
